Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MARY ELIADES'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Ara R. Jabagchourian of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy LLP (650.697.6000) for petitioner and moving party; Daniel S. Gonzales of Ferrari Ottoboni Caputo & Wunderling (408.280.0535) for respondent and opposing party.
The court denied respondent's request for a continuance. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted for respondent's failure to provide courtesy copies of the opposition in compliance with local rule 2.6 (b) and court's direction on 9/6/11. Order and judgment signed in open court. (301/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Continued To Sep-23-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER MARY ELIADES' Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 23, 2011 FOR DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION NO LATER THAN 9/13/11. COURTESY COPIES TO REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. SEE LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Sonia Wong, CSR # 11288 =301/PJB
